---
title: "In my blogging era"
date: 2026-04-05
description: "An introduction of sorts (and a promise to myself, made public)."
categories: [personal]
---

I recently completed an entire overhaul of my personal site, and as part of this transformation I have promised myself I will use this platform to *blog*. Me, blogging! Who'd have thought, yet here we are. Both of us. Thank you for being here. I cannot promise you a curated and über detailed and researched topic. In all honesty, this will likely be more of a stream of thoughts, quickly typed with a few typos here and there. But I will try my hardest to make it worth your while.
